caption: Narendra Modi stands at a podium against a decorative green stone wall with geometric patterns. He is dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit consisting of a long tunic and a matching sleeveless jacket. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. He begins by standing still with a neutral expression, looking forward. As the sequence progresses, he begins to speak, bringing his hands together in front of him in a gesturing motion. Finally, he raises his left hand, extending his fingers while speaking. Throughout the video, the background and his position remain constant, while his facial expressions and hand movements change to accompany his speech. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
